prompt: Rewrite: I do not have time, so I do not travel.
source_sentence: I do not have time, so I do not travel.
correct_answers: If I had time, I would travel.
accepted_answers: If I had time, I would travel.
If I had time, I would travel

prompt: Rewrite: She does not know the answer, so she does not help.
